_notes: Method-B v2 single-round variant for apples-to-apples vs method_c. 1×200 training eps with one held-out 50-ep eval at the end (matching method_c's structure). Identical turnrd config to method_hgpo_turnrd_v2.json — the only thing that changes vs the 5×40 sweep is the orchestration (rounds=1 episodes-per-round=200 at the CLI level), removing the 4 mid-training evals that drag down the mean. Loses the TurnRD inter-round refresh feature (only 1 round) but keeps the v2 architecture + identifiable Σα·v R-loss + progress-prior init. Cache paths redirected to /vol/cache/method_b_v2_1x200/ to avoid colliding with the 5×40 v2 cache.
